calendar.matters:
Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Oct-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. DAVID COOK, Esq. of Cook Collection Attorneys, APLC (tel: 415-989-4730) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for assignment of rights, restraining order, and turnover order" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
